Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: ROMEO, JULIET & SI NENEK
programme.desc: Midun, who was in the midst of a passionate romance with Mira, was extremely annoyed with Mira's grandmother, who constantly criticized him, saying he was reckless, had no future, and was rude, to the point of interfering in his relationship with Mira.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.desc: To-ming asks Ting Ning to pass the letter to Sung Kiu. Sung Kiu contacts Fong Fong and gives the proposal to her. She suggests MLC building its own airport. programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Spongebob and Patrick think their homes have been sold and move away, pleasing Squidward; fortune cookies predict the future so Plankton uses them for his schemes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When the Krusty Krab runs out of mustard, Mr. Krabs sends SpongeBob, Patrick and Squidward to dig up some more; SpongeBob and Sandy have to collect Krabby Patty ingredients, but Plankton follows their every step.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs' customers abandon him when SpongeBob starts cooking at home; when Plankton gets kicked out of the house, SpongeBob must teach him how to win his computer wife back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick leads an enthusiastic stranger on a tour of his favorite places in Bikini Bottom; SpongeBob is afraid to get off the roof of the Krusty Krab, but he will not let that stop him from living his life.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs' mother starts to date; SpongeBob wants to make his own version of the "Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy" movie.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick make it their mission to reunite the recently fired robot band from Goofy Goober's; Patrick is sent to the pound for acting like a worm, but he won't be able to leave unless SpongeBob can train him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to find a way to get Squidward to visit him at his home; SpongeBob must search for a new pair of pants after his square pants shrink in the dryer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick take Squidward jellyfishing; SpongeBob is a victim of Plankton's scheme.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Sandy puts SpongeBob and Patrick in charge of her pet caterpillar; SpongeBob invents colored Krabby patties.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick gets his license and wins a car; a document reveals that Patrick is next in line to become a king.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: It's Halloween in Bikini Bottom, and the Flying Dutchman is going to make sure everyone's scared - including SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob celebrates the anniversary of his friendship with Squidward, but Squidward doesn't; Squidward's lack of talent lands him in a court ordered music class.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The Krusty Crew builds a boat for its penny-pinching captain; SpongeBob discovers a crazed castaway living in his walls.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick learn the secret origins of Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy; Plankton grows a second eye and becomes nice.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Squidward take a delivery to a dreaded town where the laws of logic no longer apply; SpongeBob can't stop biting his nails, but he also can't figure out why.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When SpongeBob mistakes an escaped convict for his driving instructor, it is the new teacher who learns a lesson; Mr. Krabs sends SpongeBob in search of a missing toy, and SpongeBob finds himself lost in the lost-and-found.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward gets left with a mess when SpongeBob and Patrick use carrier clams to send messages to each other; after cooking his kazillionth Krabby Patty, SpongeBob believes he's developed an allergy to them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Gary is given a set of limbs to keep up with SpongeBob, but soon makes his owner look sluggish; Plankton practices ruling the world by shrinking himself and declaring himself king of SpongeBob's aquarium.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob blows bubbles; SpongeBob accidentally rips his pants while trying to impress Sandy Cheeks at Mussel Beach.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward gets SpongeBob fired; Sandy and SpongeBob encounter a ferocious worm.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Sandy leads the scouts through space for scientific exploration, where SpongeBob finds life exists in the form of a Krabby Patty, Sandy studies the moon's gravitational effect on nuts, and Squidward goes to the dark side.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs offers Patrick a job holding a sign at the Krusty Krab; SpongeBob and Patrick are accidentally locked in a toy store after it closes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick begins to take over SpongeBob's life and identity; SpongeBob blows a bubble to keep him company.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
